params.name: Color Bead No.6
params.description: This magical orb is produced in the mini-game, It Takes 5. The investors repeatedly stressed the importance of making players stay longer in the game, so the devs have no choice but to offer this Relic in the mini-game!
params.ss1: Lottery Green Orbs turn to Blue by +0.2%
